title: TFC Hammer Time: (Unofficial Port)
description: A mod that adds 3x3 hammers and excavators to use along with TerraFirmaCraft.
body:
## TFC Hammer Time: (Unofficial Port)

# Disclaimer

This is a port of [TFC: Hammer Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/tfc-hammer-time) by RTCornejo for Neoforge 1.21.1 which TFC 4.x.x is on. The original mod was published under MIT license, making this unofficial port possible. This port will remain under MIT license. 

# Original Description (with edits)

This addon introduces sledgehammers and excavators, a powerful new mining tool for Terrafirmacraft. Designed for efficiency, they allow players to mine a 3x3 area with a single swing, making large-scale mining projects faster and more convenient.

To craft they require a hammer/shovel head on the top right, a rod in the middle of the same metal, and a stick at the bottom left. With a recipe that requires you first unlock the corresponding anvil, the mod aims at balancing the convenience of the sledgehammers with Terrafirmacraft's design and progression system.

Whether you're building expansive underground bases or simply want to gather resources more efficiently, the sledgehammer is an essential tool for any serious miner. Download now to streamline your resource gathering and enhance your Terrafirmacraft adventure!
